content: Guys listen I think i get Saya's Event story now

So it was like it happened years after Saya bloomed in the original game and died she became one of the silver core floating in the cosmos aimlessly till Tinct coincidentally pick her up out of pity waking her consciousness back
But she lost her memories only the longing for her beloved remains she asks tinct to bring her along with her but she refused she needs to find feint ASAP
Still Saya follows her trail till she somehow ends up near on Morimens world she sense some kind of link on the keeper and decided to pull him in she mistakenly thought of him as her beloved person

Upon contact on her realm Saya obviously manipulated his memories altering his perception similar to that of Fuminori now all the important person on keeper's memories looked like a D slime abominations

She established a link with Keeper and tried to keep him within her realm but as she originally isn't of this world the realm is doomed to be dissolved by D-slime along with her which is the caused why she is getting weaker and dying each after episode
So tldr  to get her as our awakened she is doomed to die before the link is complete
PS. I think these Dandelions are her scattered flesh and those flesh we perceived are D-slime eating her realm

great analysis, i think there's only a few holes that need to be sorted out with this analysis:
- Saya knew that keeper wasn't her lover, but she still remembered what love was. Her attempts to seduce keeper is closer mirroring her original instincts of "assimilating and breeding" with her half-remembered memories of "love"
- When keeper met her she has not linked with them yet. This is confirmed by keeper when they link with Saya at the end of the story.
Huh yeah they didn't linked yet it's still in process when Keeper touched Saya hand there's a response of something electric I think that's a connection in progress imo
yeah thats the linking!
i think saya was trying to convince keeper to breed with her? maybe?
but that kinda contradicts saya's "true love"
then again sayas story is about exploring different types of love

The entire event is exchanging philosophy about love on each other the premise have little next to no explanation

I can't believe y'all discussed bird twins aus while I was asleep rip 
-# ~~(while I don't necessarily agree with all of the characterization y'all suggested re:Pollux and Castor in an au where castor got the sacred heart, I Do see the vision there. putting those birds in a washing machine of misery I guess)~~
bird fan! how would you cook this soup?

uhh give me a hot second to reread, but off the top of my head I do NOT think Pollux would like, just Leave even if he did want freedom -- I think his love for his brother would lead him to stay if he couldn't convince castor to leave/seek freedom, they're twins and they stick together after all
I just woke up so give me a hot sec to try n compile my thoughts
(side note venush describing castor as an otome love interest is hysterical to me. castor dating sim. . .)

if it were a straight role reversal of sorts I imagine Pollux would keep his wings if he were put in the Pool of Sin -- the removal of wings was meant to be a punishment but so was being put in the Pool, I don't think Juliette would do both to one singular twin

I also am not sure if Pollux would necessarily still become so abrasive -- considering what we see of him in castor's audio drama where he was much sweeter in his youth, I can see him becoming more abrasive/harsh than he was, but still not to his canon personality levels, I think he'd be more quiet and stoic (and that Castor, in such a situation where he gets the Sacred Heart, would Also become very quiet and stoic and cold).

I do think Pollux would've tried a second time to escape but I do also imagine that it would be similar to canon castor's escape attempt in that he wouldn't make an attempt until he thought/knew there was a way to get his brother out with him. if this is just a straight role reversal I don't see why it couldn't happen similar to canon

i do approve of the thought of Pollux trying to take down the Church from inside it, that's always fun; haven't done arc 2 chapter 5 yet so I can't speak on nefraea or how I'd include her at all

as far as whether Pollux would stay locked in the cell or not, I don't think Juliette would keep him locked up for forever, just because she does care very much about appearances I think, and the twin divi need to y'know be *twins*; even if he's much less favored than castor, I don't see why Pollux trading roles with castor wouldn't be allowed to be out of the cell by the time canon starts, if castor in canon was allowed to do so. it's about like. . . the appearances of the twin divi, and the at least superficial appearance of both of them being revered gods even if in truth they're both sacrifices, y'know.

. . . I don't actually know if these rambles answered your question(s) but I am very sleepy still and did my best to compile the thoughts so hopefully it is enough. I have Very Strong feelings about bird twins characterization but always feel free to take it with a grain of salt
(anyways I have dropped my ramble I am going back to bed bc it is still too early to be awake. y'all have fun)
